headline: Consumer Internet Stocks Q1 Results: Benchmarking Take-Two (NASDAQ:TTWO)
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the consumer internet stocks, including Take-Two (NASDAQ:TTWO) and its peers.
